SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Interface Download

All Known Implementing Classes:
SwingDownload, SwingFileDownload
public interface Download
This interface represents a single instance of an ongoing or complete download. The only concrete implementation at present is SwingFileDownload, which uses Swing's built-in thread management to try to prevent background operations messing up the UI.

    Get the target object, which might represent a local file or a stream player, among others.

    Get the URL that is the source of the transfer.

    Associate this download with a instance of DownloadMonitor.

  • Method Details

    • cancel

      void cancel()
      Cancel the transfer, free resources.

    • getURL

      String getURL()
      Get the URL that is the source of the transfer.

    • getTarget

      DownloadTarget getTarget()
      Get the target object, which might represent a local file or a stream player, among others.

    • getSize

      int getSize()
      Get the size of the transfer. Implementations are expected to keep this up to date as the transfer progresses.

    • getStatus

      int getStatus()

    • isExposed

      boolean isExposed()
      Not yet used -- it was supposed to indicate whether a transfer should be shown in the UI.

    • setDownloadMonitor

      void setDownloadMonitor(DownloadMonitor dm)
      Associate this download with a instance of DownloadMonitor. Implementations are expected to update the DownloadMonitor with their progress.

    • start

      void start()
